shots.visual: 公园遛娃：近景口播/问题特写
shots.copy: Hard to warm a bottle at the park?
shots.notes: Hook opening, park outing with baby, same approved caregiver as reference: 女性角色-照护者-01; wardrobe cream chunky ribbed knit sweater, light-wash straight-leg jeans, white sneakers; match likeness and realistic hand physics, medium shot holding portable rechargeable milk-warming thermos cup, matte lavender purple cylindrical body, flip-top hinged lid with integrated circular pour spout hole in bowl-shaped lid recess, light-purple lid release button, nurture wise band, vertical digital Fahrenheit °F display showing ~98°F, pour-spout reference photo beside separate baby bottle on bedside table, warm soft light, subtle push-in, vertical 9:16, TikTok product ad style, no medical claim, same person identity across all shots, motivated key light, soft shadows, natural reflections, realistic exposure, match white-background hero product appearance exactly, no redesign; physics-safe pour and hand motion; scenario-consistent props. Portable thermos cup warms milk inside; pour body-warm milk OUT through lid spout into baby bottle; Fahrenheit °F display ~98°F only, no °C; no steam or boiling; never put bottle inside cup; match white-background hero and pour-spout reference exactly. Mood: Hard to warm a bottle at the park?

shots.visual: 公园遛娃：储奶袋/家用奶瓶经翻盖倒入杯内加热，倾斜经盖面圆孔出液嘴倒入干净奶瓶（便携设计；产品为可充电加热保温杯（独立于奶瓶的圆柱暖奶容器，非奶瓶暖奶器）；用法：从储奶袋或家用奶瓶经翻开顶盖倒入杯内加热保温，再倾斜杯身经盖面圆孔出液嘴倒出到干净奶瓶喂哺；禁止：把奶瓶放进杯内、从宽口直倒（必须经过圆孔出液嘴）、奶瓶浸在杯中加热）
shots.copy: Portable heating that keeps up with your park day.
shots.notes: Product demo, park outing with baby, same approved caregiver as reference: 女性角色-照护者-01; wardrobe cream chunky ribbed knit sweater, light-wash straight-leg jeans, white sneakers; match likeness and realistic hand physics, side angle — flip-top lid open, pour milk INTO portable rechargeable milk-warming thermos cup, matte lavender purple cylindrical body, flip-top hinged lid with integrated circular pour spout hole in bowl-shaped lid recess, light-purple lid release button, nurture wise band, vertical digital Fahrenheit °F display showing ~98°F, pour-spout reference photo, tilt to pour warm milk OUT from lid spout into baby feeding bottle, realistic pour physics, vertical display visible, vertical 9:16, TikTok product ad style, no medical claim, same person identity across all shots, motivated key light, soft shadows, natural reflections, realistic exposure, match white-background hero product appearance exactly, no redesign; physics-safe pour and hand motion; scenario-consistent props. Portable thermos cup warms milk inside; pour body-warm milk OUT through lid spout into baby bottle; Fahrenheit °F display ~98°F only, no °C; no steam or boiling; never put bottle inside cup; match white-background hero and pour-spout reference exactly. STRUCTURE (match pour-spout product reference exactly): flip-top hinged lid on top with light-purple side release button, NOT a screw cap; integrated POUR OUTLET is a small circular spout hole inside a bowl-shaped recess on the lid — when cup is tilted, warm milk streams OUT thro. Portable heating that keeps up with your park day.
